purpose: Checkpoint 2 stage-pressure language for the browser demo.

5.name: Identity vs. Role Confusion
5.need: clear health identity and values alignment

6.name: Intimacy vs. Isolation
6.pressure: connection may cost self-care or independence
6.need: healthy relationship support and sustainable routines

7.name: Generativity vs. Stagnation
7.pressure: care for others may crowd out renewal

8.name: Integrity vs. Despair
8.pressure: the past may feel fixed or wasted
